name: vicegerent-hermes-npm
description: All globally-installed npm CLIs baked into the sandbox image, since the egress-locked sandbox cannot npm-install at runtime. Two groups: LSP servers from Hermes' INSTALL_RECIPES (agent/lsp/install.py) that Hermes launches by binary name for semantic diagnostics, and the coding-agent CLIs (claude-code, codex) Hermes delegates to. gopls (Go) is built in a separate Dockerfile stage; the three manual-only LSPs (rust-analyzer, clangd, lua-language-server) are intentionally excluded. Add a package = add a line; Renovate's native npm manager tracks them all.
